Meta.title: Tigran Mkrtchyan — Full-Stack Developer
Meta.description: Portfolio of Tigran Mkrtchyan: full-stack web projects, commercial work, and case studies.

Hero.tagline: I am a skilled software developer delivering high-quality solutions across diverse projects. My expertise spans front-end and back-end development, including TypeScript, React, Next.js and Redux.
Hero.tagline2: I specialize in creating user-friendly interfaces and scalable systems to meet client needs. My passion lies in solving complex challenges with clean and effective solutions.

Home.featuredSubtitle: A few projects I'm proud of — see the full list on the projects page.

Home.ctaText: I'm open to full-stack roles and freelance work.

About.title: About me
About.body: I'm a full-stack developer focused on React, Next.js and TypeScript. I like turning messy requirements into clean, reliable products — and shipping them. Below are some of the things I've built, including commercial work I can only show through screenshots.
